metadata.note: Most tasks in this iteration are NOT pilot-phase tasks. They are targeted experiments and analyses designed to resolve specific blocking issues identified over 3 consecutive reviews. The 'pilot' fields in task_plan.json specify pass criteria for each task but these are full experiments, not exploratory pilots.

validate_integration.description: Data integrity check across all source JSONs and paper.md
validate_integration.pass_criteria: All mismatches identified; all 9 persistent core words named
validate_integration.go_nogo: GO if script runs and produces validation report. Always GO -- no abort condition.

partial_correlation_cmi.description: Partial Spearman correlation controlling for probe F1
partial_correlation_cmi.pass_criteria: Partial rho computed; if |partial_rho| < 0.2, CMI result is substantially confounded
partial_correlation_cmi.go_nogo: Always GO. Result informs Section 6 framing.

leave_one_out_cmi.pass_criteria: All 25 leave-one-out rho values; max influence identified

threshold_sensitivity_report.description: Extract and summarize existing threshold sensitivity data
threshold_sensitivity_report.pass_criteria: Summary table generated; control failure diagnosis at strict thresholds

control_failure_diagnosis.description: Analytical computation explaining why controls fail
control_failure_diagnosis.pass_criteria: Random vector candidate counts computed; mechanistic explanation articulated

activation_patching_core_words.description: Causal intervention: zero child features, check parent recovery
activation_patching_core_words.pass_criteria_go: Patching completed for >=7/9 words; control shows no recovery
activation_patching_core_words.pass_criteria_positive: Parent recovers for >=5/9 words -> competitive exclusion confirmed
activation_patching_core_words.pass_criteria_negative: Parent recovers for 0-2/9 words -> metric miscalibration narrative strengthened
activation_patching_core_words.abort_condition: Cannot identify child features for >=4 words -> INVESTIGATE data pipeline before proceeding

tightened_hedging.description: Parent-specific latent check for hedging classification
tightened_hedging.pass_criteria_go: Strict and permissive rates computed for all 25 letters
tightened_hedging.key_threshold: Strict hedging rate. If >80%: headline validated. If <50%: major narrative revision needed.
tightened_hedging.abort_condition: Cannot load L0=176 SAE config -> FALLBACK to L0=82 (still has many more features than L0=22)

cmi_replication_l0_22.description: CMI estimation with perfect probes (all F1=1.0) at L0=22
cmi_replication_l0_22.pass_criteria_go: CMI estimated for all 25 letters at d'=10 with bootstrap CIs
cmi_replication_l0_22.pass_criteria_significant: Bonferroni p < 0.05 at pre-registered d'=10 -> theoretical pillar secured
cmi_replication_l0_22.pass_criteria_nonsignificant: Bonferroni p > 0.05 -> downgrade to exploratory, paper stands on empirical pillars
cmi_replication_l0_22.abort_condition: k-NN estimator numerical instability at L0=22 (higher-dimensional due to more active features) -> reduce d' candidates to {5, 10} only
